cssRules: .split-words .word { display: inline-flex; line-height: 1; margin: -0.1em -0.05em; overflow: hidden; padding: 0.15em 0.05em; }
.slideshow-word { text-align: center; justify-content: center !important; align-items: center !important; }
.slideshow-word .button--fixed, .slideshow-word .button--blur { background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; border-color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; }
